prompt: Assess how far along the work is, the percent complete, any defects, and the remaining work.
scenario: You are on a residential job — a service call, remodel, or homeowner installation with prescriptive code and manufacturer instructions. The work under review is Form build & bracing, part of the Concrete & Masonry scope. The observed field condition is: blowout evidence. The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: ACI 347. Treat this as roughly 70 percent complete until defects are corrected.
title: Progress assessment: Form build & bracing (residential job)
